scripts.test: node -e "const { spawnSync } = require('node:child_process'); const { existsSync } = require('node:fs'); const args = process.argv.slice(1); const classify = (p) => ({ inWeb: existsSync('web/' + p), inBackend: existsSync('backend/' + p) }); let prefix = 'web'; if (args.length) { const hits = args.map(classify); const onlyWeb = hits.some((h) => h.inWeb && !h.inBackend); const onlyBackend = hits.some((h) => h.inBackend && !h.inWeb); prefix = onlyWeb && !onlyBackend ? 'web' : onlyBackend && !onlyWeb ? 'backend' : 'backend'; } const target = ['--prefix', prefix, 'run', 'test', ...(args.length ? ['--', ...args] : [])]; const r = spawnSync('npm', target, { stdio: 'inherit' }); process.exit(r.status ?? 1);"
scripts.build: npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix web run build
